title: Dental Hygienist

rationales.taskAutomation: Cleanings, scaling and patient education are licensed physical acts performed chairside; almost none of the core task is digital.
rationales.toolMaturity: Little purpose-built AI targets hygienist tasks directly; generic charting software is the extent of current tooling.
rationales.adoption: AI has essentially no adoption footprint in the hygienist's actual task list beyond scheduling software.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can handle recall scheduling and note templating, but the in-mouth procedure itself is untouched by agentic tools.

salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 29-1292 (Dental Hygienists), p25-p75 rounded
insight: Hygiene work is a licensed physical act performed in a patient's mouth, one of the least AI-exposed jobs in health care. The only automatable slice is scheduling and note templating around the appointment.
